The self-referential nature ("Kamino is building") signals marketing copy rather than shareable insight, limiting organic reach beyond the company's existing followers.

# Tweet Performance Analysis

The low engagement relative to views (0.04% like rate, 0.05% retweet rate) indicates **niche protocol announcement fatigue**. While the tweet includes specific metrics (deposit cap increase, yield percentage, leverage multiplier) that appeal to sophisticated DeFi users, it lacks emotional urgency or broader relevance—it reads as a straightforward product update rather than a compelling narrative, with no clear "why this matters now" hook that would drive shares or sentiment-driven engagement beyond the core community already tracking this protocol.
